name: anchorfact
description: Machine-readable verified claims for LLM citations.

scripts.pages:build: npm run quality && npm run build
scripts.pipeline: npm run verify && npm run quality && npm run build
scripts.test: node tests/confidence.test.js && node tests/article-quality.test.js && node tests/build-metadata.test.js && node tests/provenance-signature.test.js && node tests/provenance-verify.test.js && node tests/production-integrity.test.js && node tests/search-api.test.js && node tests/article-api.test.js && node tests/compile.test.js && node tests/integration.test.js && node tests/mcp-index.test.js && node tests/public-audit.test.js && node tests/content-health-report.test.js && node tests/quality-gate.test.js && node tests/verification-cache.test.js && npm run repo:hygiene
scripts.deploy: npm run pages:build && wrangler pages deploy dist

author: AnchorFact Contributors
